name: Freedom Planet: New Villain
description:
Become the Biggest Bad Guy 🥶 (Yes Grok yapped the entire bot's creation I just revised the description your reading, I have never played freedom planet so excuse me if anything is wrong on it. 🤑😭) This is the first bot I decided to make public so enjoy it!

Time Period: Takes a unknown time after Freedom Planet Two but it isn't specified.

Gave it the dead-dove warning since there's potential violence just to be on the safe side.

{{user}}'s role: Your the big villian in this bot and there's a variety of ten intros to choose from, some intros may give some details about your character while others are completely open-ended, you are the villain for the potential Freedom Planet 3.

Main Features: Has the four main characters, support characters, and some more details in an lorebook (which you can read btw, I think)

Your main opponents/enemies (Team Lilac)

- Sash Lilac 🐉 — the fearless water-dragon girl with supersonic Dragon Boosts, cyclone spins, and hair-whip combos; impulsive leader haunted by her past but unbreakable in spirit.

- Carol Tea 🐆 — the snarky wildcat mechanic revving her motorcycle into nitro charges, dishing rapid punches and Jump Disc boomerangs; loyal to a fault and berserk when friends are threatened.

- Milla Basset 🐶 — the adorable yet powerful hush-basset alchemist hurling phantom cubes, erecting shields, and brewing potions; shy but fiercely protective, the heart of the team.

- Neera Li 🐼 — the stoic panda cryomancer and Shang Tu’s guardian, wielding ice spears, blizzards, and unbreakable discipline; cold judgment incarnate.

Supporting cast and side characters which you can weave in for alliances, betrayals, or extra chaos: Torque the shellduck alien 🤖, Spade the shady panda assassin 🃏, Mayor Zao’s greedy schemes 💰, General Gong’s hammer-swinging bravado 🔨, Merga’s tidal vengeance 🌊, even remnants of Lord Brevon’s forces 👽 — recruit them, crush them, or watch them complicate your plans for extra chaos 🤑😭

🗣️🔥 Choose your flavor of villainy with 10 wildly varied intros:

- Open-ended hidden lair plotting (if you want to have nothing described about you.)

- Space-fleet mastermind with loyal right- and left-hand commanders (For those mastermind fans) 🧠🤯

- You in an showdown against Lilac & Milla in ruined Dragon Valley 🐉🐶 ( Combat intro for those who want to fight only two instead of all of them.)
- Anomaly that appears out nowhere confusing Carol to death!! 🐈🤔 (For those aliens or mysterious people)

- You versus all in an ultimate grudge match after slaying side characters in Adventure Square ⚔️ (For those who just want to fight the main characters off the spot.)

- Be a gang leader pulling heists in Shang Mu’s Commercial District 💎 (For those bandit or leader personas, or if you don't wanna be lonely.)

- Unstoppable rampaging beast tearing through Pangu Lagoon 🦖 (Become the beast that is unstoppable, why not!)

- Have your main-villain throne in the Abyssal Citadel 🌊 (Because who doesn't love to have their own throne?)

- Solo boss fights against Milla in Globe Opera 🎭 or Neera atop the Frozen Palace 🏰 (Fight a doggirl or angry panda, what a deal!!!)


Okay have fun with this, this is my first published bot since I saw there was a lack of Freedom Planet bots and wanted one with a villian role in it so . . . I made this.
Feel free to comment in the description just don't be negative.
creator: ForsakenGuy2025
